docket_entries.description: (SC-108) REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUSTAFA, MOHAMMAD
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MUSTAFA, MOHAMMAD AS TO DEFENDANT TURO CORPORATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$75.00) SERVED JUL-19-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TURO CORPORATION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-12-2016 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK S. LE, NOT REPORTED (506)
RETURNED MAIL: PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM MAILED CERTIFIED TO AOS ANNE DORMAN RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS, UNABLE TO FORWARD
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-12-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-01-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MUSTAFA, MOHAMMAD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TURO CORPORATION $1,453.13 PRINCIPAL, $165.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,618.13, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $644.18, AN AMOUNT WHICH DEFENDANT HAS ALREADY PAID TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER (SC-108) ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT: THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING ORDER: [X] THE REQUEST IS DENIED.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-12-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-12-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, MOHAMMAD MUSTAFA, NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK S. LE, NOT REPORTED (506)
